melee_attacks.notes: Supports main-path melee attacks, HP mutation, and defeat status.

missile_attacks.notes: Supports simplified main-path missile attacks; full range/cover modifiers remain incomplete.

initiative_segments.notes: Simplified round order is used for most main-path scenes.

spell_casting.notes: Supports selected spells used by the main path: magic missile, sleep, web, cure light wounds, and darkness-like scripted effects.

spell_interruption.notes: Helper exists for main-path cases; full AD&D segment timing is not complete.

turn_undead.notes: Compact facade for supported tests and selected encounters.

morale_reaction.notes: Main-path morale helpers exist; exhaustive DMG morale procedures are not complete.

dragon_fear_breath.notes: Khisanth main-path scripting is supported; generic dragon handling is partial.

staff_of_mishakal.notes: Supports party possession, recharge, and finale shatter.

dl1_main_path.notes: Event 1 through Epilogue main spine is implemented.

dl1_optional_branches.notes: Several scenes have content stubs, but full open-ended branch play remains future work.

item_saving_throws.notes: Recognized as a rule capability but not resolved in play.

xp_training.notes: Helper-level XP/treasure support only; full training economy is not complete.
